final:
module top_module(
  input ld,
  output reg vd,
  output reg [7:0] d,
  output reg lz,
  input vz,
  input [7:0] z,
  output reg [7:0] size,
  input req_size,
  input [7:0] sizez,
  output reg sizelz
);always @(*) begin
  d = z ;
  end

  always @(*) begin
  lz = ld ;
  vd = vz ;
  size = sizez ;
  sizelz = req_size ;
  end

endmodule
